description:
Third subticket. Depends on .18.2.

`alias A.B.C` registers C as a short nickname for A.B.C inside the current module body. `alias A.B.C, as: D` lets the user pick the nickname.

## Scope

- Parser: top-of-module `alias <Path>` and `alias <Path>, as: <Upper>` items.
- AST: Item::Alias { full_path: Vec<String>, as_name: String } scoped per-module.
- Resolution: maintain alias map per module; when resolving `Var(C)` (Upper) on the LHS of a Dot, expand to the full path.
- Lexically scoped: an alias inside one module does not leak into siblings.

## Tests

- alias A.B.C; then C.f(1) calls A.B.C.f.
- alias with :as keyword renames.
- Two modules with non-overlapping aliases don't see each other's aliases.
title: alias
